text:
(a) Four hundred? _4 times
(b)3,700? _37 times
(c) 10,000? _100 times
(d) Fifty three thousand? _530 times
(e) 90,000? _900 times
(f) 97,600? _976 times
(g) 1,00,000? _1000 times
(h) _58200_?582 times
(i) How many hundreds are required to make ten thousand ? 100
(k) Handy Hundreds says, “There are some numbers which Tediou
Tens and Thoughtful Thousands can't show but I can'. Is th
statement true? Think and explore.
